text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... D-don't leave me behiiiind!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: You're late, Spe! The hell were you doing?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I'm so sorry! Suzuka's big race is today, so I didn't get any sleep...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Shouldn't it be Suzuka who has trouble sleeping?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
If your tardiness ends up getting Suzuka disqualified, you'll be in biiig
trouble.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ehehe...

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: All right, ready to go?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's been several months since the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, Silence Suzuka is scheduled to run in the autumn Tenno Sho at
the Tokyo Racecourse. She's currently the favorite to win.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Air Groove... and Fukukitaru?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Your cheerleading squad is here, Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I've got to pay you back eventually for the Takarazuka Kinen, after
all. I'm taking this opportunity to study every move you make.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Really? Was that what you said? I could've sworn you were all gung
ho about cheering for her when you invited me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
W-well, that's what I mean! Observation can be a form of support, you
know.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: In any case, I want to be the one to beat you, so you'd better not lose.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes, I promise I'll be the first past the finish line.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I shall also be praying for your success! May the gods be in your favor!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... Let's hope they're in a good mood.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Well... this is as far as I go.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Well... this is as far as I go.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
But remember, I'm always with you, along with my hopes and dreams.
Now go see the scenery you're seeking!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
But remember, I'm always with you, along with my hopes and dreams.
Now go see the scenery you're seeking!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I'll run towards that scenery, enjoy the view, and give you a sight to
behold. After that...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I promise I'll return to you.
choice_data_list: And I know you will! Go get 'em!
And I know you will! Go get 'em!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Right!
